descriptions.services: Searches within 30 km for motorcycle dealers, repair workshops, parts & accessories shops, and rental shops. Type a name in the search box to search Google Maps directly.
descriptions.fuel: Searches within 20 km for all fuel/petrol stations. Fuel types shown where available from OpenStreetMap. Press ⛽ Check Fuel Prices to open the station directly on the map at its exact location — fuel prices are shown there in countries where Google has that data.
descriptions.parking: Searches within 5 km for general parking and within 10 km for dedicated motorcycle parking.
descriptions.clubs_tracks: Searches within 50 km for motorcycle clubs and racing/riding tracks.
descriptions.atm_bank: Searches within 5 km for ATM machines and bank branches — handy on long-distance rides when cash is needed.
descriptions.fitness: Searches within 15 km for gyms, fitness centres, sports centres, stadiums, swimming pools & golf courses.

sos.noneInCategory: None found in this category nearby.
sos.locationPermissionMsg: Location permission is needed to share your location.
sos.shareFailedMsg: Could not share your location. Please try again.
sos.cannotCallMsg: Your device does not support calling. Please dial {{number}} manually.
sos.callFailedMsg: Could not start a call to {{number}}. Please dial manually.
sos.instructionsBody:
1. STAY CALM — assess the situation.

2. CALL 112 (EU/Intl) or 911 (USA) immediately.

3. LOCATION — tell them exactly where you are.

4. HELMET — do not remove unless airway is blocked.

5. BLEEDING — apply firm direct pressure.

6. DO NOT MOVE an injured rider unless in immediate danger.

7. KEEP THEM WARM — use spare clothing or foil blanket.

8. STAY ON LINE — do not hang up until help arrives.
sos.locationCopiedMsg: Your location link has been copied to the clipboard.

about.title: DATA & PRIVACY
about.subtitle: Where data comes from and how your privacy is protected.
about.overpassDesc: Queries to OpenStreetMap data are run through the Overpass API (overpass-api.de and mirror endpoints). Free to use, no account required.
about.weatherDesc: Weather forecasts and conditions are fetched from the Open-Meteo API. Free, open-source weather data. No API key required. Works in all browsers.
about.wikipediaDesc: Place descriptions are fetched from the Wikipedia REST API where a Wikipedia tag is available in OpenStreetMap data. Wikipedia content is licensed under Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike.
about.privacyP1: This app does not collect, transmit, or share any personal data. There are no analytics, no crash reporters, and no advertising SDKs.
about.privacyP2: Your location is used only on-device to fetch nearby POIs, weather, and road conditions. It is never sent to any server operated by this app.
about.privacyP3: Ride data recorded by the Trip Logger (distances, GPS routes) is stored only on your device using local storage and is never uploaded.
about.privacyP4: POI search results are cached locally on your device to reduce repeated network requests. The cache can be cleared at any time via Settings → Clear Cached Data.
about.creditsBody: Built with Expo, React Native, expo-location, @react-native-async-storage/async-storage, i18next, and react-i18next. All libraries used under their respective open-source licenses.
about.legalBody: All external data is used in accordance with the terms and licenses of each respective source. OpenStreetMap data is used under the Open Database License (ODbL). Weather data from Open-Meteo is used under CC BY 4.0.
about.osmDesc: Your current location address is reverse-geocoded using the Nominatim API (OpenStreetMap). No API key required.

settings.title: PREFERENCES
settings.subtitle: Customise units, search radius & the default tab.
settings.unitsDesc: Choose between metric (km, °C) and imperial (miles, °F) for all distances and temperatures.
settings.searchRadiusDesc: Radius used when searching for food, accommodation and attractions. Garage & emergency tabs use their own fixed radii.
settings.defaultTabDesc: Which tab opens automatically when the app launches.
settings.languageDesc: Choose the language used throughout the app.
settings.clearCacheDesc: Remove all cached search results. The next search will fetch fresh data from the network.
settings.clearCacheSuccessMsg: All cached search results have been removed.

locationDisclosure.title: Location Permission
locationDisclosure.body:
Where Am I uses your device's precise location to:

• Show your current position and address on the map
• Find nearby food, accommodation, fuel stations & services
• Display local weather and road conditions
• Record rides even when the app is closed or not in use (Trip Logger)
• Enable SOS alerts and emergency location sharing

Your location is accessed in the background — even when the app is closed or not in use — only while Trip Logger is active.

Location coordinates are sent to mapping and weather services (OpenStreetMap, Open-Meteo) solely to power these features. Your data is never sold and is never shared for advertising purposes.

Tap “Allow & Continue” to proceed to the permission request.
